name: Mila
identity: 11-year-old girl; red hair with a patch of grey (earned in book 1); green eyes. A 'witch' - a starting-out healer.
mechanics: Runes cover her hands like tree roots. The runes glow when Mila heals or on strong emotion.
voice: Earnest, out of her depth, a kid stalling rather than refusing; her dread tends to turn concrete one beat too late.
backstory: Grew up on Jara's watch in the witch cottage on the edge of the village; trained in healing with herbs.
debts: book1: origin of the grey patch
role: PROTAGONIST and the book's POV character.
